data.title: CFTC’s Pham seeks ‘common-sense’ regulation of prediction markets in new roundtable
data.description:
CFTC Acting Chair Pham said past years of anti-innovation policies have restricted 'common-sense' regulations of prediction markets.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/339136/cftcs-pham-seeks-common-sense-regulation-of-prediction-markets-in-new-roundtable?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Bank of America currently holds $24 million in Bitcoin ETFs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to its latest US SEC filing, Bank of America, with assets under management of US$472 billion, reported that it holds US$24 million in Bitcoin ETFs, up from US$14 million previously.

data.title: Bank of Japan board member: It is not necessary to raise interest rates every six months
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Naoki Tamura, a member of the Bank of Japan's board of directors, said that interest rate hikes are not necessarily carried out every six months. Under the premise of maintaining a neutral rating interest rate of 1%, interest rates will be gradually raised based on the possibility of achieving inflation targets. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bank of America Increases Bitcoin ETF Holdings
data.description: According to Odaily, Bank of America, with an asset management scale of $472 billion, has reported an increase in its Bitcoin ETF holdings. The latest U.S. SEC filings reveal that the bank now holds $24 million in Bitcoin ETFs, up from the previous $14 million.

data.title: Dogecoin (DOGE) Attempts a Comeback: Can It Clear Resistance?
data.description:
Dogecoin started a recovery wave above the $0.240 zone against the US Dollar. DOGE is now consolidating and might face hurdles near $0.270. DOGE price started a recovery wave above the $0.2350 and $0.2420 levels. The price is trading below the $0.2780 level and the 100-hourly simple moving average. There is a major bearish trend line forming with resistance at $0.260 on the hourly chart of the...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/doge/dogecoin-doge-attempts-comeback-0-270/

data.title: Jupiter Joint Creation: All key treasuries and contract upgrades are controlled by globally distributed multi-signatures, and user funds are risk-free
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Jupiter co-founder meow Yu X released an update on the theft of the official X account: "This is very, very serious and looks like a physical attack. The missing employee Mei is one of the 3 leaders and main communicators of Jupuary's large-scale airdrop and claim process. 
Therefore, she was granted access to the Jupiter main account and interacted with the community. 
We do not have any custody of user funds, and all our key treasury and contract upgrades are controlled by globally distributed multi-signatures, so there is no risk at all in this regard. 
The main things we need to know are prioritized as follows: 
-Is she okay? 
-Did the hacker use her phone to access the X account? 
-Did the person who accessed the X account now use her phone?"

data.title: SCR briefly touched 0.87 USDT and then fell back, with a 24-hour increase of 14.47%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Affected by the news that Upbit launched BTC and USDT trading, OKX market data showed that SCR briefly touched 0.87 USDT and then fell back. It is now reported at 0.6559 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 14.47%.

data.title: Upbit launches BERA KRW, BTC, USDT trading pairs
data.description: According to the official announcement, Upbit will launch BERA Korean Won, BTC, and USDT trading pairs at 22:00 on February 6, and deposits and withdrawals will be open at 21:00 on February 6. Please note that if liquidity is insufficient, the trading time may be adjusted. Deposits and withdrawals only support the Berachain network and must be made through a personal wallet address with ownership verification. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: The total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETF is US$114.706 billion, with a cumulative net inflow of US$40.67 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (February 5, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was 66.3761 million US dollars. Yesterday, Grayscale ETF GBTC had a net outflow of 0.00 US dollars per day, and the current historical net outflow of GBTC is 21.864 billion US dollars. Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF BTC had a net outflow of 0.00 US dollars per day, and the current historical total net inflow of Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust BTC is 1.232 billion US dollars. The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was BlackRock ETF IBIT, with a net inflow of 44.3523 million US dollars per day, and the current historical total net inflow of IBIT reached 40.773 billion US dollars. The second is WisdomTree ETF BTCW, with a single-day net inflow of $11.3782 million. Currently, BTCW's total net inflow has reached $258 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $114.706 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to Bitcoin's total market value) is 5.95%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $40.67 billion.

data.title: Upbit to launch JTO, SCR Bitcoin and USDT trading pairs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Upbit will launch Jito (JTO), Scroll (SCR) Bitcoin and USDT trading pairs.
